exemplar.title:
How does the narrative structure of Gone Girl by Gillian Flynn manifest the theme of
manipulation?

detailedExemplarData.title:
How does the narrative structure of Gone Girl by Gillian Flynn manifest the theme of
manipulation?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Topic is communicated accurately and effectively, with each major section tied back to the theme of manipulation
Research question is clearly stated, focused, and sustained throughout the essay
weaknesses: Methodology is only partially effective, with no dedicated section explaining source selection or evaluation
Limited evidence of rigorous criteria for choosing and justifying secondary sources
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates clear purpose and focus, and the research question is tightly integrated into every body section, justifying a band-3/4 performance at the upper end (4/6). However, the methodology strand falls short of the highest band: there is no explicit methodological section, and little evaluation of source reliability. A score of 4 reflects strong topic communication and RQ focus balanced by an underdeveloped methodology.

strengths: Good knowledge of Gone Girl, with accurate plot references and coherent application of Forsterâs round character concept
Mostly accurate use of specialist terminology such as âheteroglossiaâ, âcarnivalizationâ, and âpostmodernismâ
weaknesses: Heavy reliance on non-scholarly blogs and study guides weakens academic depth
Occasional slips in conceptual precision (e.g., conflating heteroglossia with media representation)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work shows solid understanding of the primary text and relevant concepts, and terminology is generally applied correctly. However, overreliance on non-academic sources and occasional conceptual misapplications prevent it reaching the top band. A score of 4/6 appropriately reflects this âgoodâ but not âexcellentâ performance.

strengths: Primary quotations and examples (e.g., stream-of-consciousness passages) are well chosen and linked to manipulation
Clear line of argument that ties narrative techniques back to the research question
Effective synthesis where the theme of manipulation is linked to contemporary issues like misinformation
weaknesses: Source quality is uneven, with many citations from popular websites that lack academic credibility
Arguments sometimes rest on assertions or sweeping claims without deep textual unpacking
Evaluation is limited: counter-arguments and alternative perspectives are rarely considered
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Research relevance is generally evident and the analysis moves beyond summary, but the uneven source quality and limited critical evaluation keep the work in the middle of the 1â12 scale. A score of 5 reflects adequate-to-good research and analysis with room for greater depth, source evaluation, and critical reflection.

strengths: Clearly appropriate overall structure with title page, table of contents, section headings, conclusion, and bibliography
Formatting is broadly consistent, and word count and title are provided
weaknesses: Page numbers are not clearly visible in the footer, hindering navigation
Minor typographical artifacts and missing EE elements (e.g., abstract, uniform sub-heading levels) detract from polish
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The presentation meets most EE structural requirements and supports readability, justifying a band-3/4 performance at 3/4. Minor issues with pagination, residual artifacts, and missing formal elements prevent a top-band score.

strandSelections.reasoning: The essay draws on a reasonable range of critical concepts (Bakhtin, Forster, post-modern theory) and lists 30+ secondary sources; however, most are popular websites, blogs or study guides, and there is little explanation of how or why particular sources were selected.  No explicit methodological section appears, and there is scant evidence of rigorous evaluation of source reliability.  Thus methodology is âmostly completeâ but only partly effective, meriting the middle band (3-4) at the lower end.

Word count, title and table are provided and in-text citations and a bibliography are present.  Formatting is broadly consistent, yet page numbers are unclear and some typographical artefacts (HTML entities, superscripts) suggest imperfect presentation.  Layout considerations are therefore âpresent and mostly correctâ, meriting the 3-4 band at 3.

Research is adequate: quotations from the primary text are well chosen and numerous, and secondary material â while uneven in academic quality â generally relates to manipulation or narrative technique.  Because many citations are derivative (Shmoop, Bartleby, Medium) the overall quality is mixed, but relevance to the RQ is usually evident; this fits the 4-6 band at its lower point (4).

The studentâs topic â the ways narrative structure in Gone Girl embodies manipulation â is announced in the title, research question and opening paragraph.  Purpose and focus remain clear throughout the essay: each major section (circular structure, stream-of-consciousness, heteroglossia, carnivalization, post-modern voice, round characters) is explicitly tied back to the overarching theme of manipulation.  Minor digressions (occasional material on feminism or comparisons with The Girl on the Train) do not seriously blur that focus, so overall communication is accurate and effective, warranting the upper band (5-6).

A clear line of argument runs through sections, but evaluation of sources, techniques or alternative readings is minimal.  Counter-arguments (e.g. other reasons for Amyâs behaviour) are rarely weighed, and the conclusion largely recaps rather than critically reflects.  Discussion shows âgoodâ coherence yet limited critical evaluation, so the strand sits at 4.

The essay moves beyond summary and offers analysis (e.g. showing how circular structure mirrors the cyclical power struggle; how diary form manipulates reader sympathy).  Yet arguments often rest on assertion rather than close textual unpacking, and theoretical references are explained only briefly.  Conclusions are sometimes sweeping (âturns them into psychopathsâ) without firm evidence.  Hence analysis is âadequateâ to âgoodâ, warranting a 4.

The essay follows required EE structure: title page details, table of contents, clear section headings, conclusion and bibliography.  Minor EE elements (abstract, consistent sub-heading levels) are missing, but overall the structure supports reading, so the higher band (3-4) is appropriate at a score of 3.

The student demonstrates solid knowledge of Gone Girl, quoting accurately and situating points within the plot.  Key theoretical terms are introduced with dictionary-style definitions and applied plausibly.  Nonetheless, reliance on non-scholarly internet sources limits depth, and some claims (e.g. Amy âfirst unlikeable female characterâ) are historically naÃ¯ve.  Overall knowledge is âgoodâ but not âexcellentâ, placing it at the top of the 3-4 band.

Literary terminology such as âheteroglossiaâ, âcarnivalizationâ, âstream of consciousnessâ, âround characterâ, and âpostmodernismâ is used frequently and mostly accurately.  Occasional slips (e.g. confusing heteroglossia with media representation) show partial misunderstanding, so usage is âmostly accurateâ rather than consistently precise, justifying a 4.

The research question â âHow does the narrative structure of Gone Girl â¦ manifest the theme of manipulation?â â is clearly, succinctly stated and is narrow enough to be explored in 4â000 words.  Every body section is organised around elements of narrative structure that answer this exact question, showing an effective connection between RQ and discussion.  Because the link between question and analysis is strong and sustained, the work fits comfortably in the 5-6 band.

annotations.comment: The table of contents is detailed and clear, aiding navigation and demonstrating strong presentation skills.
Page numbers are not clearly visible in the footer, which may hinder reader navigation and should be made prominent.
The definition of manipulation relies on a general online dictionary; consider engaging with peer-reviewed or theoretical sources to deepen conceptual understanding.
Introduce a dedicated methodology section early on to explain source selection criteria and strengthen transparency of research methods.
The analysis of circular narrative structure relies on a popular website without evaluating its academic credibility; justify source reliability to reinforce methodological rigor.
The carnivalization section primarily cites study guides rather than scholarly critiques; diversify source types to enhance academic rigor.
Ensure each section concludes with a clear analytical summary that ties back to the research question to maintain logical flow.
The title effectively communicates the investigationâs topic and sets a clear focus on manipulation in Gone Girl.
The research question is clearly stated, focused, and effectively guides the analysis throughout the essay.
The inclusion of a precise word count and subject category meets formatting requirements and demonstrates attention to administrative details.
Citing âJohn, 2022â from a non-scholarly blog weakens source application; consider replacing with a peer-reviewed analysis of nonlinear narratives.
Extensive plot summary in the circular structure section precedes analysis; integrate concise narrative overview with focused critical commentary.
The discussion of stream of consciousness effectively uses direct quotations to illustrate how diary entries reveal Amyâs internal manipulation.
Build on the definition of stream of consciousness by contrasting it with other narrative modes to highlight its unique role in reader manipulation.
The interpretation of heteroglossia is conflated with media influence; ensure precise application of Bakhtinâs concept to multiple narrative voices rather than external media discourse.
Explicitly link Bakhtinâs heteroglossia to the theme of manipulation by showing how competing voices in the text distort reader perception.
Consider engaging with an alternative critical perspective that challenges the mediaâs manipulative role to enrich source evaluation.
Residual inline math artifacts appear at the page bottom, disrupting presentation; remove or replace with proper numbering.
The application of Forsterâs round character theory is coherent and supports the argument about the protagonistsâ complexity.
Introduce an alternative model of character analysis to compare with Forsterâs theory and deepen critical evaluation.
Reliance on SparkNotes citations for character insights undercuts the essayâs academic tone; prioritize peer-reviewed sources.
The comparison with The Girl on the Train in the conclusion introduces a new work without development; either expand the analysis or omit it for stronger focus.
The claim about Flynnâs pioneering depiction of unlikeable female characters lacks evidentiary support; reference feminist literary history to substantiate.
The Wall Street Journal quote on postmodern narrative lacks a formal citation in the bibliography; include complete publication details.
The postmodernism discussion adeptly links theoretical concepts to textual examples, reinforcing the analysis of narrative unreliability.
The conclusion largely recaps previous points without critically evaluating implications or reflecting on limitations; add evaluative insights to strengthen it.
Linking the novelâs manipulation theme to contemporary issues like misinformation displays effective synthesis and real-world application.
Avoid conversational phrasing in the final section; maintain a consistently formal academic tone to match the rest of the essay.
Several bibliographic entries include truncated URLs and inconsistent formatting; ensure each source follows a uniform citation style.
